questions.question: Explain the concept of normalization in database design. Provide one type of normal form (i.e. 1NF, 2NF, 3NF) as an example. (6 marks)
State the advantages of using a relational database management system over a hierarchical or network database. (4 marks)
Describe the difference between primary key, foreign key, and unique constraint in a database. Provide an example of each. (8 marks)
